title: Ping Indicator+
description: Improve server and player ping icons with colorful bars and more!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VV5Z0iMs/images/8ce003d98c4614fc40792ed463712c258b0e2744.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3e51414e66e6c8accf0fbbd60a4d1e79206fa4.png)

# About:
This simple resource pack changes the ping indicator to show connection strength with colored bars for each server or player instead of it being all green.

### What each color represents:
- At 5 bars = Green
- At 4 bars = Yellow-Green
- At 3 bars = Yellow
- At 2 bars = Orange
- At 1 bar = Red
- Incompatible Version - Normal X Indicator
- Unknown/Unreachable - Question Mark Indicator

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e3e51414e66e6c8accf0fbbd60a4d1e79206fa4.png)

### Example server List with the resource pack installed.
![Server List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VV5Z0iMs/images/9a008190af451445f8423c6efde3ea7e02cfd80f.png)

### Also Available At:
[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ping-indicator-plus)

_Note: Modrinth is the main download page. CurseForge page may receive updates a bit later._
